name: guilty-spark
author: David Houweling
description: Discord app to pull Halo stats from Halo Waypoint. Works in conjunction with NeatQueue.

scripts.start: npm run start:api & npm run start:pages
scripts.test:changed: vitest run related $(git diff --name-only main... | while IFS= read -r file; do [ -e "$file" ] && printf '%s\n' "$file"; done) $(git diff --name-only HEAD | while IFS= read -r file; do [ -e "$file" ] && printf '%s\n' "$file"; done)
scripts.format:changed:fix: prettier --write --ignore-unknown $(git diff --name-only main... | while IFS= read -r file; do [ -e "$file" ] && printf '%s\n' "$file"; done) $(git diff --name-only HEAD | while IFS= read -r file; do [ -e "$file" ] && printf '%s\n' "$file"; done)
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ts && npm run stylelint:pages
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:ts:fix && npm run stylelint:pages:fix
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:pages
scripts.done: npm run format:changed:fix && npm run typecheck && npm run lint:fix && npm run test:changed
